overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring the historic city of Saint Denis. The character walks through a brick courtyard, exits to a cobblestone street, and strolls along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages in a sunny, atmospheric urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic brick courtyard with tropical vegetation and wooden barrels

events.description: passing by an NPC standing near wooden barrels in the courtyard
opening wooden gate and preparing to exit courtyard to street

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow courtyard passage between red brick buildings, approaching wooden gate

notable_agents.action: man in light blue coat standing near wooden barrels, turns to observe ego

dilapidated wooden building with sloped roof
large tropical plant with broad green leaves
stacked wooden barrels and crates in courtyard
second-floor wooden balcony with simple railings
tall wooden plank gate set in arched brick frame

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow historic courtyard enclosed by red brick buildings and tropical vegetation. An NPC stands near wooden barrels watching as the character approaches a large wooden gate at the far end of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone intersection with tram tracks and arched buildings

events.description: exiting enclosed courtyard into open sunlit cobblestone street
crossing cobblestone street with visible tram tracks

agents.ego_description: stepping out from gate and crossing the open cobblestone intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: wide cobblestone road with metal tram tracks running through center
row of historic buildings with arched ground floor openings
weathered two-story building with shuttered windows
elevated wooden plank walkway along building front
ornate black cast iron street lamp with curved design

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the courtyard into a bright open intersection with cobblestone streets and tram tracks. Historic buildings line the area as the character crosses toward a wooden sidewalk, passing an ornate street lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic main street with wooden sidewalks and tram tracks

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by closely on the right side
beginning to walk alongside NPC woman on wooden sidewalk
rider on horseback passes by in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages on the street

notable_agents.action: woman in period dress with bonnet walking alongside ego on wooden sidewalk
black horse-drawn carriage moving along the street with driver atop

entered.detail: second-floor balconies with ornate black wrought iron railings
fabric awning extending over shop entrance on right

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden sidewalk of a busy historic main street, the character passes horse-drawn carriages on the cobblestone road and walks alongside a woman in period dress. Ornate wrought iron balconies adorn the brick buildings as tram tracks run down the center of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded brick courtyard into the bustling, sunlit streets of a historic city. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage enclosed by red brick buildings and tropical greenery, passing a bystander near wooden barrels toward a large gate. As the character emerges from the gate, the scene opens into a bright intersection where the enclosed walls give way to wide cobblestone streets, tram tracks, and ornate street lamps. The camera then shifts to follow the character onto a wooden sidewalk, moving past pedestrians in period dress and horse-drawn carriages. Finally, the view expands along a busy main street lined with brick buildings featuring wrought iron balconies under a clear, sunny sky.
